# ArunKumar Kandasamy — Principal Software Engineer & Technical Consultant

Site: https://arunkumar1ly.vercel.app
Consulting case studies: https://arunkumar1ly.vercel.app/consulting
Resume (PDF): https://arunkumar1ly.vercel.app/arunkumar-kandasamy-resume.pdf
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/arun1ly
GitHub: https://github.com/arunkumark1ly

ArunKumar Kandasamy is a Chennai-based Principal Software Engineer with 16+ years of experience designing and delivering web platforms and enterprise products. He combines hands-on architecture and engineering (Ruby on Rails, React, Next.js, cloud, distributed systems) with end-to-end technical delivery ownership.

## AI-Augmented Engineering Practices

- Implemented AI-assisted software engineering practices across Ruby on Rails application development and DevOps workflows using Claude, Cursor IDE, and LLM-based coding assistants for architecture design, code generation, refactoring, test automation, and technical documentation.
- Integrated AI capabilities into Dockerized environments and GitHub Actions to optimize CI/CD pipelines, automate code quality checks, security scanning, release validations, and deployment processes.
- Established prompt-engineering and AI code-review guidelines to maintain consistency, security, and quality standards across AI-assisted contributions to production Rails services.

## Core focus

- Ruby on Rails, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS
- Solutions architecture (HLD/LLD), performance engineering, CI/CD
- Independent consulting: frontend engineering, UI/UX, Terraform/AWS deployment

- / — Portfolio home (about, experience, projects, contact)
- /consulting — Freelance and consulting case studies
